metadata.guardrail: AI copy is generated from validated metrics and does not modify numeric source data.

hero.headline: Closed-won sales are behind goal by $250,000
hero.body: The latest CRM refresh shows $1,750,000 in closed-won sales against the $2,000,000 goal — 88% of target, a $250,000 gap to close. $13,760,000 of pipeline is still open and working to close it.

change.headline: Northstar Logistics grew by $8,000,000 — pipeline doubled this refresh
change.body: OPP-2026-001 (Northstar Logistics, Negotiation) was updated from $1,185,000 to $9,185,000, a $8,000,000 increase. Total pipeline value jumped from $8,200,000 to $16,200,000, open pipeline from $5,760,000 to $13,760,000, and weighted pipeline from $5,241,300 to $11,801,300.

cards.title: Goal status
cards.body: Closed-won revenue missed the $2,000,000 target by $250,000, landing at 88% attainment.

cards.title: What's driving it
cards.body: The biggest win on the board so far is Pinnacle BioSystems at $1,240,000, booked by Jordan Miles in the West region. It is not yet enough to clear the target.

cards.title: Pipeline coverage
cards.body: $13,760,000 of pipeline is still open. Weighted by win probability, the full book forecasts to $11,801,300. Avery Chen is carrying the most at $10,240,000, led by the Northstar Logistics deal in Negotiation.

cards.title: Needs attention
cards.body: 2 open opportunities have gone untouched for 21+ days and stay flagged for follow-up. Closest to landing: 3 deals worth $10,300,000 sitting in Negotiation.
